llm_operation.reason: torch.eig has been removed since PyTorch 1.9 (deprecated in 1.9, removed in later versions), and its replacement is torch.linalg.eig / torch.linalg.eigvals. paddle.linalg.eig exists but does not accept 'eigenvectors' as a keyword argument — it always computes both eigenvalues and eigenvectors, with no boolean flag. Therefore, skipping is appropriate.
